# Yugam

> Yugam is an AI transformation consultancy run by Rohit Kumar Maskara (Yugam Systems Pte Ltd, Singapore). Readiness-first consulting for founders and mid-market leadership teams: AI strategy, system architecture, and implementation grounded in how the business actually operates — data, processes, and people before tools.

Rohit Kumar Maskara: a decade at Meta, Fortune 500 governance at KPMG, started on a manufacturing shop floor. B.Tech Industrial Engineering, MBA in Operations Strategy & Finance.

Core position: AI tools are easy to buy. Knowing which ones a business needs — and whether the organization can support them — is the real work. Most AI projects fail for organizational reasons, not technical ones.

## Services

- [How We Work](https://www.yugam.io/#services): Three engagement tiers — Assess (2–4 weeks, readiness audit), Build (8–16 weeks, design and implement), Train (flexible, team enablement)
- [Engagement Methodology](https://www.yugam.io/methodology.html): Phase-by-phase breakdown of how an engagement runs

## Frameworks and articles

- [The 4 Failure Modes That Kill AI Projects](https://www.yugam.io/blog-post-why-ai-deployments-fail.html): Why 70% of AI initiatives fail — a framework for diagnosing organizational readiness before writing code
- [Why 95% of AI Projects Fail to Generate ROI](https://www.yugam.io/resources/article-2026-06-27-why-95-percent-fail.html): Three root causes from major 2026 studies (Deloitte, BCG, HBR, WEF) — all pointing to organizational readiness, not technology
- [How to Spot AI Opportunities in Your Business](https://www.yugam.io/resources/article-2026-07-05-how-to-spot-ai-opportunities.html): Four tests — volume, repeatability, data, cost of error — for finding processes where AI creates value; score by the minimum, not the average
- [How Much Does AI Implementation Cost?](https://www.yugam.io/resources/article-2026-07-05-what-ai-implementation-costs.html): $25K–150K year one for mid-market; the four cost layers and the three patterns that blow up budgets
- [FAQ](https://www.yugam.io/faq.html): Direct answers on AI readiness, costs, timelines, failure causes, tool selection, adoption, and how a Yugam engagement works

## Free diagnostic tools

- [AI Transformation Index](https://www.yugam.io/ai-transformation-index/): 10-minute diagnostic — AI readiness score, leadership archetype, top 3 use cases
- [AI Opportunity Finder](https://www.yugam.io/resources/ai-opportunity-finder.html): Which processes are worth automating
- [Data Readiness Scan](https://www.yugam.io/resources/data-readiness.html): Whether existing data can support AI
- [Team Readiness Check](https://www.yugam.io/resources/team-readiness.html): Whether teams will adopt AI tools
- [Implementation Complexity Score](https://www.yugam.io/resources/complexity-score.html): How hard an AI implementation will be
- [Cost-to-Deploy Calculator](https://www.yugam.io/resources/cost-calculator.html): Realistic AI implementation cost estimate
- [AI Competitive Gap Analysis](https://www.yugam.io/resources/competitive-assessment.html): Competitive position on AI adoption
- [AI Implementation Risk Playbook](https://www.yugam.io/resources/risk-playbook.html): Mapping projects against the 4-failure-mode framework

## Resources

- [The AI Stack](https://www.yugam.io/ai-stack.html): Opinionated, tested tool recommendations for SMBs and mid-market teams
- [Prompt Library](https://www.yugam.io/prompt-library.html): Ready-to-use AI prompts for operations and customer experience
- [About Rohit](https://www.yugam.io/about.html): Background and philosophy
